info.description: Configuration Management & Auditing Engine API for Personal Life Operating System (PLOS).
info.title: Digital Twin Config Engine API

get.description: Get a list of all PLOS event property validation keys

post.description: Create a new validation property key for event types

put.description: Update a validation key by event code and key name

delete.description: Delete a validation key by event code and key name

get.description: Get a list of all PLOS unit dimensions

post.description: Create a new measurement context dimension

put.description: Update a measurement dimension by code

delete.description: Delete a measurement dimension by code

get.description: Get a list of all PLOS event categories

post.description: Create a new event classification category

put.description: Update an event category by code

delete.description: Delete an event category by code

get.description: Get a list of all PLOS configuration modules

put.description: Update a configuration module by ID

delete.description: Delete a configuration module by ID

get.description: Get a list of all entity templates

post.description: Create a new entity configuration template

put.description: Update an entity template by ID

delete.description: Delete an entity template by ID

get.description: Retrieve count aggregates across the 9 database tables
Get a list of all logged event metadata attributes

post.description: Add metadata property attributes to a logged event

put.description: Update event metadata by event ID and attribute key name

delete.description: Delete event metadata by event ID and attribute key name

get.description: Get a list of all logged twin events

post.description: Log a new twin event entry in the ledger

put.description: Update a ledger event by ID

delete.description: Delete a ledger event by ID (cascade impacts and details)

get.description: Get a list of all logged twin impacts

post.description: Create a new ledger impact adjustment

put.description: Update a ledger impact by ID

delete.description: Delete a ledger impact by ID
